eas_text: A civil authority has issued A MISSING AND ENDANGERED PERSON ALERT for the following counties or areas: Fayette, KY; at 09:16 AM ON MAR 11, 2026 Effective until 01:16 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: An IAN Alert has been issued for JAHMARI DESHAUN CARTER a 17- year-old BLACK MALE last seen in FAYETTE COUNTY Kentucky on 03/11/26 at approximately 0930. JAHMARI is described as LIGHT SKINNED BLACK MALE  5'7" 298 LBS SMALL AMOUNT OF FACIAL HAIR WEARING A HALO MASTER CHIEF STYLE HELMET AND WHITE AND YELLOW NIKE SHOES. Stay tuned to local media for more information.
